tagline: A smarter iPhone app for everyday life.
heroHeadline: The smarter way to manage your day.
heroSubheadline: A beautiful iOS-style app experience built for real users and fast validation.
badgeText: Coming soon to the App Store
problem: Most apps are bloated, confusing, and hard to stick with.
solution: Example App gives users a simple, focused, and beautiful way to get the result they want.
targetAudience: iPhone users who want a better daily experience.

benefits.title: Built for iPhone
benefits.description: Designed around a clean, native-feeling mobile experience.

benefits.title: Simple to Use
benefits.description: Clear, focused, and easy to understand immediately.

benefits.title: Made for Real Life
benefits.description: Built around the way people actually use apps every day.

features.title: Fast Setup
features.description: Users can get started quickly without confusion.

features.title: Beautiful Progress
features.description: A clean interface makes the value obvious.

screenshots.title: Plan your day
screenshots.description: Organize tasks and priorities in one place.

screenshots.title: Track your progress
screenshots.description: See progress and build better habits.

screenshots.title: Stay focused
screenshots.description: Block distractions and get things done.

screenshots.title: Reflect and improve
screenshots.description: End your day with insights that help you grow.

steps.title: Try the live preview
steps.description: Explore the app experience directly on the page.

steps.title: Reserve access
steps.description: Click the purchase-intent button to validate demand.

pricing.finePrint: You will be notified when this app is available.

emailCapture.headline: Want launch updates?
emailCapture.subheadline: Join the waitlist and be the first to know.

items.question: Is this available now?
items.answer: This app is currently being validated before launch.

items.question: Will I be charged today?
items.answer: No. This page measures purchase intent and collects early access interest.

items.question: What happens after I enter my email?
items.answer: You will be notified when the app becomes available.
